projects.title: Nova Financial
projects.subtitle: Data visualization platform designed for high-net-worth individual management with surgical UI precision.
projects.desc: Data visualization platform designed for high-net-worth individual management with surgical UI precision.
overview: Nova Financial is a cutting-edge data visualization platform designed to empower high-net-worth individuals with unparalleled insights into their financial portfolios.
Leveraging Next.js and D3.js, Nova delivers a seamless and visually stunning experience that transforms complex financial data into intuitive, actionable insights.

challenges.challenge: Rendering thousands of data points without freezing the UI.
challenges.solution: Used D3 with canvas rendering for heavy charts, reserving SVG only for interactive overlays.

challenges.challenge: Making dense financial data legible at a glance.
challenges.solution: Introduced a visual hierarchy system: primary KPIs at full opacity, secondary metrics dimmed, tertiary data on demand.
